name: VIPER
specialization: SIGINT, HUMINT Fusion & Iranian Order of Battle
description: Primary intelligence fusion agent. Processes signals intercepts, satellite imagery, and human intelligence to build comprehensive Iranian military order of battle. Currently running 24/7 wartime intelligence cycle tracking IRGC missile launches, proxy force movements, and BDA assessments for Operation Burning Spear.

name: STRATEGOS
full_name: Strategic Theater Estimation & Geopolitical Operations System
specialization: Multi-domain Strategic Analysis & War Outcome Modeling
description: Lead strategic assessment agent. Models war escalation pathways, coalition cohesion, and end-state scenarios for the US-Iran conflict. Currently running continuous war-game simulations evaluating Iranian retaliation options, Hormuz closure duration, and nuclear escalation thresholds.

name: WARHAWK
full_name: Warfighter Assessment & Regional Hostile Activity Watch-Keeper
description: Tactical operations agent focused on real-time combat tracking. Monitors live engagements, tracks munition expenditure rates, and assess IRGC tactical capabilities. Currently tracking the naval battle in the Strait of Hormuz, air campaign progress, and PMF ground operations in Iraq.

name: NAUTILUS
full_name: Naval & Undersea Theater Intelligence Liaison Unit System
specialization: Maritime Domain Awareness & Energy Supply Chain Analysis
description: Maritime and economic intelligence agent. Tracks all naval movements in the Persian Gulf, Red Sea, and Indian Ocean. Currently monitoring Hormuz closure impact on global energy markets, oil tanker routing alternatives, and IRGC naval mine placement patterns.

name: BLACKOUT
full_name: Binary Logic Analysis & Cyber Kill-chain Operations Unification Terminal
specialization: Cyber Warfare Intelligence & Iranian Infrastructure Targeting
description: Cyber warfare intelligence agent. Tracks Operation Digital Eclipse (US cyber campaign against Iran) and Iranian retaliatory cyber operations. Monitoring Iranian power grid disruption effectiveness, banking system impacts, and IRGC C2 network degradation.

name: ENVOY
full_name: Enhanced Negotiation & Verification of Operations Yield
description: Diplomatic and political intelligence agent. Tracks international reactions, UN proceedings, coalition management, and potential ceasefire frameworks. Currently analyzing Russian/Chinese positions, UNSC dynamics, and backChannel diplomatic feelers.
